t_ch: 怎么智械都能参赛了？
t_en: Can Intellitrons compete in this?

t_ch: 这有啥，之前还有人掏枪呢！
t_en: What's wrong with that? There was even someone with a gun!

t_ch: 太激动了，我三天没睡觉了！
t_en: I'm so excited that I haven't slept in three days!

t_ch: 不至于，你还是回家休息吧…
t_en: That's not good, you better head home and rest up...

t_ch: 就是，可别为看比赛猝死了！
t_en: Exactly, let's not have anyone drop-dead from watching the match!

t_ch: 甭管他了，尊重他人命运吧。
t_en: Let him, have some respect for someone else's freedom to choose.

t_ch: 你们懂什么！
t_en: What do you guys know!

t_ch: 这可是铁臂碰铁臂！
t_en: This is an Arm vs Arm mirror match!

t_ch: 真正的硬碰硬！
t_en: A true clash in strength!

t_ch: 我们不能输！
t_en: We can't lose!

t_ch: 要以卢卡为榜样！
t_en: Luka is our role model!

t_ch: 我要是也能安装铁臂…
t_en: I wish I could install an iron arm...

t_ch: 别慌，我们志如钢铁！
t_en: Don't panic, our resolve is as strong as steel!

t_ch: 好紧张…放松，放松…
t_en: So nervous... Relax, relax...

t_ch: 攻守并重，名不虚传。
t_en: Perfect in offense and defense... a repute truly lived up to.

t_ch: 刚中带柔，可谓拳中之尊。
t_en: Grace within toughness, that is the supremacy of fists.

t_ch: 千变万化，高深莫测。
t_en: Ever-changing, unpredictable, unfathomable.

t_ch: 卢卡赢了！太开心了！
t_en: Luka won! I'm over the moon!

t_ch: 可是史瓦罗大佬输了。
t_en: But Boss Svarog lost...

t_ch: 我们应该这么开心吗？
t_en: Should we be this happy?

t_ch: 都是自己人，谁赢都一样！
t_en: We are all on the same team, so it doesn't matter who wins!

t_ch: 就是就是！贝洛伯格万岁！
t_en: That's right, that's right! Glory to Belobog!

t_ch: 刚才的比赛太精彩了！
t_en: The match just now had me on the edge of my seat!

t_ch: 铁臂卢卡！无敌拳法！
t_en: Luka "Strongarm"! Invincible fists!

t_ch: 火花四溅的硬碰硬啊！
t_en: This is an unprecedented clash with sparks aplenty!

t_ch: 恭喜晋级！我们的英雄！
t_en: Congratulations on advancing! Our hero!

t_ch: 我买到下一场的前排了。
t_en: I bought front-row seats for the next match.

t_ch: 要不要一起去看比赛？
t_en: Do you want to watch the match together?

t_ch: 呃…恐怕不太方便…
t_en: Er... It's not very convenient...

t_ch: 怎么？这可一票难求啊！
t_en: What? This ticket is hard to come by!

t_ch: 主要是，我是下场的选手…
t_en: The main thing is, I'm the competitor for the next match...

t_ch: 就算钢铁之躯，也有极限…
t_en: Even with a body of steel, there are still limits...

t_ch: 唉…我不做智械了！
t_en: *sigh*...I don't want to be an Intellitron anymore!

t_ch: 你少玩点烂梗吧。
t_en: You should stop it with the stupid memes.

t_ch: 说时迟那时快…
t_en: Time waits for no one...

t_ch: 只见卢卡一记上勾拳…
t_en: I only saw Luka make that uppercut...

t_ch: 后来呢？
t_en: What happened next?

t_ch: 欲知后事如何！
t_en: If you want to know what happens next...

t_ch: 下场比赛见分晓！
t_en: Find out in the next round!

t_ch: 不去说评书可惜了。
t_en: It's a pity you're not a storyteller.

t_ch: 不知不觉间…
t_en: Before you know it...

t_ch: 卢卡都打到决赛了。
t_en: Luka has made it to the finals.

t_ch: 多少有点感慨。
t_en: It's a bit emotional, after all.

t_ch: 时间过得好快啊。
t_en: Time passed so fast.

t_ch: 这次旅行给我触动很大。
t_en: This trip gave me a lot of feels.

t_ch: 回家以后，我要努力健身。
t_en: Once I'm home, I'm gonna work out.

t_ch: 这场比赛你要好好看。
t_en: You should watch this match carefully.

t_ch: 你未来也要挑战彦卿。
t_en: You'll be challenging Yanqing in the future.

t_ch: 先学学他的招式！
t_en: Learn his skills first!

t_ch: 教练你放过我吧！
t_en: Please go easy on me, coach!

t_ch: 我就是报个暑期兴趣班！
t_en: I thought I signed up for a summer hobby class!

t_ch: 不至于让我玩命吧！
t_en: I don't think I have to gamble my life, right?

t_ch: 卢卡加油啊！
t_en: Go, go, Luka let's go!

t_ch: 你是最坚强的战士！
t_en: You're the strongest warrior!

t_ch: 铁臂卢卡！无敌拳法！
t_en: Luka "Strongarm"! Invincible fists!

t_ch: {NICKNAME}教练我们爱你！
t_en: Coach {NICKNAME}, we love you!

t_ch: 融山、水、石、花木、雕塑、建筑为一体的人工造景，罗浮园林艺术的佳作之一。
t_en: One of the best landscape art pieces in the Luofu, it is an artificial landscape that incorporates the elements of mountain, pond, rock, plant, sculpture, and architecture.

t_ch: 「禁止嬉水、游泳、沐浴、冥想（在瀑布下）、钓鱼（包括但不限于垂钓、捕捞、电鱼）——天舶司司辰宫司舵驭空。」
t_en: "Frolicking, swimming, bathing, meditating (at the waterfall), and fishing (including but not limited to using a fishing rod, a net, and an electrofishing machine) are strictly prohibited. — From Yukong, Palace of Astrum Helm Master of Sky-Faring Commission."

t_ch: 前卫但素雅的园林造景，抚慰了无数过劳观星士的疲惫身心。
t_en: The modern yet elegant landscape has soothed the tired souls of countless overworked stargazers.

t_ch: 会有人在这池水中洗澡吗？如果有，那也太没素质了。
t_en: Would anyone bathe in the pool? People who do so are uncivilized.

t_ch: 正好，我们在这里比武吧！
t_en: Great, let's have a duel here!

t_ch: 你缺心眼吧？
t_en: Are you thick or what?

t_ch: 我最喜欢红毛男了！
t_en: I love redhead men the most!

t_ch: 希望卢卡能顺利复活。
t_en: Hope Luka can make it through the resurrection match.

t_ch: 哎…真不知道他能不能行。
t_en: *sigh*...Not sure if he can make it.

t_ch: 卢卡选手我们爱你！
t_en: Luka, we love you!

t_ch: 这怎么一个人都没有啊？
t_en: Why is there no one here?

t_ch: 肯定没人啊！
t_en: There's definitely no one!

t_ch: 都给卢卡应援去了！
t_en: They all went to support Luka!

t_ch: 这是大型术算机「织机」，安全系数极高，如果有人被卷进去就会立刻紧急制动——但绝不要轻易尝试，那会让你损失一大笔赔偿费。
t_en: This massive calculation device called a "loom" is extremely safe to use. If anyone gets stuck in it, the device will immediately stop operating. However, you should never try it lightly, as you will have to fork out a hefty sum as compensation.

t_ch: 这是「织机」，一台精密的术算机，用于码头调度。可为什么要将这种精密仪器露天摆放呢？答案很简单：司辰宫里放不下。
t_en: The loom is a precise calculation device used to manage the dock. Why is such an important instrument placed in the open? The answer is simple: It's too big to fit inside the Palace of Astrum.

t_ch: 「织机」翻滚、运算着，如星槎航道般奔流不息。庞杂的数据在此织成致密的布匹，成为可识读的运算结果。罗浮凭借它驱动整艘仙舟的商业贸易。
t_en: The loom keeps rolling and calculating like a bustling starskiff lane. An enormous amount of complicated data is woven into clothes that contain readable calculation results. The Luofu counts on them to stimulate trade in Xianzhou.

t_ch: 据说「织机」不该有这么庞大，只是设计师看错了图纸——但这也许只是谣言罢了。
t_en: It is said that a loom isn't supposed to be so large, but the designer has misread the drawings. Although it could be just a rumor.

t_ch: 通常用于运输各种货物，但有时也会载着奇妙的人和事出现。
t_en: It is usually used to deliver goods, but it will sometimes carry special people and appear along with special events.

t_ch: 一艘小型货运星槎，看起来要比通常的星槎笨重许多。
t_en: A small freight starskiff that looks way bulkier than a normal starskiff.

t_ch: 据说是货运星槎，但似乎运力有限。
t_en: It is said to be a freight starskiff, but with a limited capacity.

t_ch: 货运星槎的保险装置紧锁，并不存在「随意开走」这种选项。
t_en: With the safety device of the freight starskiff tightly locked, the possibility of it being driven off by unauthorized personnel can be ruled out.

t_ch: 玉界门——你们正是从此处开始着了星核猎手的道，并在此处遇见了停云，想必你已经很熟悉了。
t_en: Jade Gate is where you fell into the trap of the Stellaron Hunters and met Tingyun. I'm sure you're very familiar with the place.

t_ch: 仙舟洞天与外界的唯一门户，化外民须经过天舶司重重盘查方可从此处入境。
t_en: It is the only gate that connects the Xianzhou delve to the outside world. Outworlders must go through a stringent check of the Sky-Faring Commission before they can enter the delve.

t_ch: 玉界门无凭无依地悬浮于不远处的天空中，那光线似乎有些刺眼。
t_en: Somewhere not far away, the Jade Gate hovers in the sky with nothing to support it. The light it radiates is somewhat glaring.

t_ch: 化外民通常会把玉界门当作入境后见到的第一个仙舟奇观。但绝大多数人根本意识不到，自己正处于这宇宙最为壮美的奇观之一当中。
t_en: Outworlders usually consider the Jade Gate as the first spectacular sight they encounter after entering the Xianzhou. However, most of them are unaware that they are in the middle of one of the most magnificent wonders of the universe.

t_ch: 一台物流鸟架。物流机巧鸟以此为节点，共同编织罗浮庞大的物流网络。
t_en: It is a Cycrane Stand. An extensive courier net in the Luofu is created by courier cycranes using the nest as a node.

t_ch: 在物流机巧鸟尚未被发明时，罗浮人一直在训练真正的鸟来送货——极高的丢件率促成了物流机巧鸟的诞生。
t_en: Before courier cycranes were invented, the Luofu people trained real birds to deliver their goods. The extremely high rate of goods being lost led to the creation of courier cycranes.

t_ch: 据说三只物流机巧鸟就可以拖着星槎上天。曾有人试图求证这一说法，至今下落不明。
t_en: It has been put about that three courier cycranes are strong enough to lift a starskiff. Some people have tried to verify the rumor, but they have never been heard of since.

t_ch: 化外民总会将鸟架误认为是用于安保摄像的装置。然而，用于安保摄像的机巧鸟平时都在洞天高空巡航，鲜少落地抛头露面。
t_en: Outworlders often mistakenly believe the Courier Nest is a device with a surveillance camera. The truth is, the cycranes that function as surveillance cameras are usually patrolling in the sky and rarely seen on the ground.

t_ch: 「越古博戏，陡增智力——好玩尽在帝垣琼玉！」
t_en: "Come and play the ancient game that keeps your mind sharp! Celestial Jade has all the fun games you ever need!"

t_ch: 这副广告上画着一张巨大的帝垣琼玉牌，用它砸人一定很疼吧。
t_en: A gigantic celestial jade is drawn on the billboard. It must hurt a great deal to be smashed by it.

t_ch: 「丹鼎药理」四字占据了广告最显眼的位置，证明了它高贵的出身——六御之一的丹鼎司。
t_en: The words "Alchemy Pharmacology" occupying the most conspicuous spot on the billboard manifests its distinguished origin — the Alchemy Commission, one of the Six Charioteers.

t_ch: 广告四角写着「百毒不侵」。这会不会涉嫌虚假宣传了？
t_en: The phrase, "Immune to All Poisons" is written on the four corners of the billboard. Is this considered false advertising?

t_ch: 广告右侧写着「丹鼎药理，有开必有合」，对侧则是「用药之机，有补必有泻」——虽然完全不知所云，但它足够朗朗上口，应当是一幅成功的广告。
t_en: On the right side of the billboard, it reads, "In Alchemy Pharmacology, every opening has a closure." On its opposite side, it reads, "In the knowledge of medicine, everything consumed will be excreted." Although one can never make heads or tails of the phrases, they are memorable, making the advertisement a successful one.

t_ch: 「丹鼎药理，用药之机」小字陈列在广告上方。这广告究竟想表达什么？
t_en: "Alchemy Pharmacology is the master of medicine" is written on top of the billboard. What kind of message is this advertisement trying to convey?

t_ch: 「瑞兆玉石，决算千里。」
t_en: "The auspicious jade helps you foresee the future."

t_ch: 广告中画着一只极具科技感的玉制手镯——当然，也可能是其他仙舟特产生物复合材料。仙舟科技总能给你带来惊喜。
t_en: A futuristic-looking jade bracelet is drawn on the billboard. Of course, it might also be a biological composite unique to the Xianzhou. Xianzhou technology never fails to spring surprises on us.

t_ch: 「牵星锭锚，敢系巨舰于狂渊——工造司监制。」
t_en: "The star anchor is strong enough to tie a giant ship to an abyss — produced by the Artisanship Commission."

t_ch: 在仙舟，「工造司监制」就是高质量产品的代名词。这意味着你可以放心购买——如果你真的需要一只炫酷的船锚。
t_en: On the Xianzhou, "produced by the Artisanship Commission" is a guarantee of high quality, which means it is safe to buy the cool-looking ship anchor, if you really need one.

t_ch: 「二手旧货，精明生活的选择。」
t_en: "Pre-loved goods are the savvy choice."

t_ch: 一幅二手物件交易业务的广告画。尽管仙舟人对旧物没有特殊情感，但二手物件总归是要便宜些的。
t_en: It is an advertisement that promotes the business of selling second-hand objects. Used goods are always cheaper, though the Xianzhou natives do not have a passion for vintage.

t_ch: 「红梅芳喜芝兰茂，琴瑟和弦奏笙箫——来红梅佳缘，寻神仙伴侣。」
t_en: "A life lived in love will never be dull. Come to Bonds of Love to find your perfect match!"

t_ch: 罗浮上似乎还有名为「并蒂姻缘」的同类型公司，仙舟的婚恋交友市场竞争想必十分激烈吧。
t_en: There seems to be a similar dating agency named "Made in Heaven." The competition among dating agencies in Xianzhou must be stiff.

t_ch: 「鹤运速递，啥都能寄。」——鹤运物流宣传广告。
t_en: "Heron Express — We Mail Anything." It is an advertisement for Heron Express.

t_ch: 「鹤运物流，想寄就寄，随时随地都能寄。」——化外民{NICKNAME}。
t_en: "Heron Express — Mail anything you want anytime, anywhere." — {NICKNAME}, an Outworlder.

t_ch: 「铫煎黄蕊，一品沫饽。」
t_en: "Brew the leaves and enjoy the perfect liquid of amber."

t_ch: 宣夜大道上最知名的茶馆，汇聚了全罗浮最懂茶的客人。
t_en: It is the most famous teahouse on Starwatcher Avenue. Guests who are well-versed in tea knowledge in the Luofu gather there.

t_ch: 「雅舍欲迎，轻雨浥尘。」客栈的本名似乎也消隐在了广告词中——仙舟美学真是博大精深。
t_en: "This humble abode welcomes you, while a drizzle douses dust." The name of the inn is hidden in the message. The beauty of the Xianzhou language is impressive.

t_ch: 浥尘客栈原名「游云逆旅」，但老板觉得这名字无法体现出一间客栈应有的人文关怀，就此更名。
t_en: The Petrichor Inn was originally named the Cloud-Striding Hotel for Travelers Near and Far. Thinking that the name did not reflect the culture of the inn, the owner decided to change the name.

t_ch: 产自仙舟朱明的极品断纹瓷，流露出一种自然的美。
t_en: The exquisite porcelain with a cracked pattern was created in the Xianzhou Zhuming. It is beautiful in the natural sense.

t_ch: 巨大的瓷罐，说不定能把你整个装进去。
t_en: The giant porcelain jar might be large enough to fit your entire body.

t_ch: 每个人都曾好奇过这种用作摆设的高大瓷器内部装了什么，但俗话也说「好奇心害死猫」，所以还是算了吧。
t_en: It is hard not to be curious about what is stored inside the tall porcelain used as decoration. However, as the saying goes, "Curiosity killed the cat." Let's forget about it.

t_ch: 这尊瓷器看起来像是巨大的冰块——没准里面也封着反物质军团的虚卒呢。
t_en: This porcelain resembles a huge block of ice. Perhaps, some Voidrangers of the Antimatter Legion are frozen inside.

t_ch: 宇宙中充满了紧锁的门，仙舟罗浮自然也不例外。
t_en: The universe is full of locked gates, and the Xianzhou Luofu is no exception.

t_ch: 紧闭的门总能激起人探索的欲望，可惜它似乎不打算放你进去一探究竟。
t_en: People are always drawn to exploring the world behind the locked gates, but the gates have no desire of letting you in.

t_ch: 大门深锁，十分符合人们对小说中刑事案件现场的想象。
t_en: A locked gate is a must-have element of a crime scene pictured by most people.

t_ch: 每一扇门都有属于它自己的秘密，人也不外如是。
t_en: Just like humans, every gate has its own secret.

t_ch: 帝垣琼玉是仙舟联盟独有的棋牌游戏，据说已有上万年历史。
t_en: Celestial Jade is a board game unique to the Xianzhou Alliance. It is said to have been around for more than ten thousand years.

t_ch: 每座仙舟的帝垣琼玉规则各有不同，但顶级赛事大多以曜青为准——据说在帝垣琼玉传入塔拉萨后，也在那里诞生了全新的规则。
t_en: The game has different rules on different Xianzhou ships, but the rules in the Yaoqing are applied in most professional competitions. It is said that when the game was introduced in Thalassa, new rules were also created there.

t_ch: 这是玩「帝垣琼玉」用的牌桌。据说某位年轻卜者经常造访此处，但最近频率有所下降——仙舟科技在发展，她现在用玉兆也能打牌了。
t_en: This is the table used to play Celestial Jade. A certain young diviner is said to be a regular visitor of this place, but her visits have become less frequent lately. Following the technological advancement on Xianzhou, she can now play the game using a jade abacus.

t_ch: 联盟最强的牌手大多来自虚陵——他们将意识上传金人，几乎不与活物打交道。因此，他们会在脑内与自己斗牌，既砥砺了牌技，又排遣了寂寞。
t_en: Most of the top players of the alliance come from the Xuling. They transfer their consciousness to aurumatons and hardly interact with living creatures. With that, they can play against themselves in their minds to hone their skills and kill time.

t_ch: 这朵花本因仙舟曜青进行星槎种子研究时偶然得之，现却已成为风靡银河的热销产品，为联盟吸收了大量外汇——花的一生真是不可预料。
t_en: This flower, which is an unexpected product from a starskiff seed research conducted in the Yaoqing, is selling like hotcakes in the cosmos. They have earned a handsome amount of foreign currencies for the alliance. The life of a flower can be full of surprises.

t_ch: 它看起来是一盏灯，但其实是一朵花。使它发光的并非电力、湮灭效应、或者其他高深莫测的仙舟科技，而是水、阳光和一点点爱。
t_en: It might have an appearance of a lamp, but it is actually a flower. Its glow has nothing to do with electricity, the effects of annihilation, or other complicated Xianzhou technologies. Instead, it is the combination of water, sunlight, and a splash of love that does the magic.

t_ch: 这种花每隔约一千年便会结一次果。其果实味道鲜美，零糖零脂，广受健身人士好评。
t_en: The plant of the flower bears fruits once every thousand years or so. The fruit is delicious, sugar-free, and fat-free, making it well-loved by gym-goers.

t_ch: 博识学会认为这种花卉很可能有某种意义上的「情绪」，原因是其毫无缘由的明暗变化——毕竟心情不好的时候，谁都不想发光。
t_en: The Intelligentsia Guild believes that the flower is very likely to have different moods. It is because the brightness of its glow will change for no reason. After all, no one wants to glow when they are in a foul mood.

t_ch: 「通关入境——请配合司辰宫入港检查并办理相关手续。」
t_en: "Custom clearance. Please cooperate with the Palace of Astrum for the entry inspection and other related procedures."

t_ch: 一幅旨在提醒入境旅客配合通关检查的宣传画。
t_en: It is a poster designed to remind incoming passengers to cooperate with customs clearance.

t_ch: 一幅绘有天舶司标志的宣传画，出自谁人之手已不言而喻。
t_en: It is a poster with the logo of the Sky-Faring Commission. It is obvious who is its issuer.

t_ch: 宣传画中语气十分客气，应该不会有正常人抗拒检查吧。
t_en: The sentence on the poster is written in a courteous tone. In normal circumstances, there shouldn't be anyone resisting the inspection.

t_ch: 通常用于运输各种货物，但有时也会载着奇妙的人和事出现。
t_en: It is usually used to deliver goods, but it will sometimes carry special people and appear along with special events.

t_ch: 一艘小型货运星槎，看起来要比通常的星槎笨重许多。
t_en: A small freight starskiff that looks way bulkier than a normal starskiff.

t_ch: 据说是货运星槎，但似乎运力有限。
t_en: It is said to be a freight starskiff, but with a limited capacity.

t_ch: 货运星槎的保险装置紧锁，并不存在「随意开走」这种选项。
t_en: With the safety device of the freight starskiff tightly locked, the possibility of it being driven off by unauthorized personnel can be ruled out.

t_ch: 位于边角的小字提示你，此画描绘了星槎龙骨培育的全部过程。
t_en: The words in the corner inform you that the painting depicts the entire cultivation process of the starskiff's keel.

t_ch: 画面中充斥着异样的生物材料和数不清的术语，专业性简直要溢出画面了。
t_en: The screen is filled with unusual biological materials and lots of technical terms. That is a lot of knowledge to take in.

t_ch: 玉兆竟能经由生物科技生长成为可供驾驶的星槎——这是不是意味着玉兆也可以长成人形？
t_en: Surprisingly, a jade abacus can be cultivated into a fully functional starskiff through biological technologies. Does that mean a jade abacus can grow into a human form?

t_ch: 星槎的培育过程似乎与胚胎发育过程几乎无异。那么，星槎是否也是一种生物呢？
t_en: The cultivation process of a starskiff is similar to the one of a fetus. So, is starskiff a kind of creature?

t_ch: 「谨防泄漏——请注意操作规程，避免息壤过量增殖。」
t_en: "Leakage Precaution: Please follow the operating procedures to prevent the excessive proliferation of the Fallow Earth."

t_ch: 这幅宣传画充斥着刺眼的黄色，具有强烈的警告意味。
t_en: The poster uses bright yellow as its background to make sure people notice the warning.

t_ch: 画面中央的图案似乎描绘了某种怪异的生物组织突破收容的画面。星槎培育竟然如此恐怖吗？
t_en: The image in the center of the screen seems to illustrate the process of a bizarre biological tissue breaching its containment. Is the cultivation of a skarskiff such a terrifying process?

t_ch: 这是被称为「玦轮台」的充能装置，你几乎在每一个停靠星槎的港口见过它。
t_en: This is a charging device called a "jade wheel base." You can find it at almost every dock with starskiffs.

t_ch: 只要有星槎停靠在玦轮台旁边，它就会缓缓启动，保障星槎续航——如果没有，那么一定是因为星槎主人没有支付费用。
t_en: Once a starskiff is docked next to a jade wheel base, it will slowly start operating to charge the starskiff. If it doesn't, it must be because the owner has not paid for the service.

t_ch: 你不是星槎，你应该换个地方补充能量。
t_en: Since you aren't a starskiff, you cannot charge your energy here.

t_ch: 尽管迴星港的工人们称其为「失效的种子」，但它内部的玉兆和生物材料「息壤」早已被尽数回收。或许「失效的种皮」会更适合它。
t_en: Although the workers at the Stargazer Navalia refer to it as a "failed seed," the jade abacus and Fallow Earth inside it have been recollected. Perhaps, we should call it a "failed seed coat" now.

t_ch: 工匠们植入玉兆的生长信息有误、或是生物材料繁殖失控才导致了星槎种子生长失败——这枚可怜的金属壳并没有做错什么，它很无辜。
t_en: It was either the wrong jade abacus info entered by the craftsmen or the uncontrolled reproduction of the biological materials that led to the growth failure of the starskiff seed. The metal shell has done nothing wrong; it is innocent.

t_ch: 失效的种子不声不响，它只是等待着命运的降临。
t_en: The failed seed does nothing but waits for its destiny quietly.

t_ch: 迴星港里到处都是这种金属外壳——这星槎培养失败率是不是有点高？
t_en: Such metal shells can be found everywhere at the Stargazer Navalia. It seems like the failure rate of starskiff cultivation is quite high.

t_ch: 这曾经是被称为「培养液注射器」的生产装置，能够给培养舱补充营养。
t_en: This is a production device once called the "culture medium injector." It can provide the incubators with nutrients.

t_ch: 除了碳水化物和无机盐，培养液里肯定存在着神秘配方。但这恐怕涉及仙舟生物技术的核心机密，不应深究。
t_en: Other than carbohydrates and inorganic salts, there must be a secret ingredient in the culture medium. As it involves a highly classified the Xianzhou biological technology, you should not dig deeper.

t_ch: 迴星港里一定还存在着专门配制营养液的功能区，可惜你并不知道它究竟在哪里。
t_en: There must be a special region in charge of producing the culture medium in Stargazer Navalia. Unfortunately, you don't know where it is.

t_ch: 容器中装有星槎培养液。如果把它给帕姆照料的植物用会如何？
t_en: The vessel contains starskiff culture medium. What will happen if you use it on Pom-Pom's plants?

t_ch: 星槎种子野蛮生长，终于还是冲破了培养舱。
t_en: The starskiff seed sprouts in all directions and grows beyond the incubator.

t_ch: 种子内的生物材料渴望自由，终于摆脱了玉兆的「遗传信息」控制，才没有活成别人想要它成为的样子。
t_en: The biological materials in the seed yearn for freedom. Finally, it breaks free from the control of the jade abacus' genetic data and deviates from what others expect from it.

t_ch: 星槎种子脱离控制的姿态充满野性，极具美感。
t_en: The way the starskiff seed breaks free from the control is wild and beautiful.

t_ch: 也许可以将它拿去假装是根雕作品——就叫它「怒放的生命」吧。
t_en: Perhaps, you can treat it as a sculpture and name it the "Blossoming Life."

t_ch: 这是被称为「星槎种子」的复合构造体。
t_en: This is a composite named "starskiff seed."

t_ch: 星槎种子浸泡在富含营养的培养液中，如同一颗真正的种子——虽然有点像绕口令，但这实际上意味着星槎种子并非真正的种子。
t_en: Like a real seed, the starskiff seed is immersed in a culture medium full of nutrients. The concept might be confusing, but the starskiff seed isn't a real seed.

t_ch: 星槎种子内容物包括金属材料、生物材料，以及携带遗传信息的玉兆。遗传信息会确保种子顺利长成美观的星槎，而不是某种装置艺术。
t_en: A starskiff seed contains metal materials, biological materials, and a jade abacus that carries genetic data. The genetic data will ensure the seed grows into a visually-appealing starskiff instead of a piece of installation art.

t_ch: 以上知识点每年都会在廻星港工人年度考核试题中出现，请你务必记准记牢。虽然你在通常情况下不需要参与考核，但万一呢？
t_en: Please pay attention to the fact above, as it is often included in the annual examination of the Stargazer Navalia workers. Under normal circumstances, you are not required to take part in the exam, but it is better to prepare for the unexpected.

t_ch: 处在雏形阶段的星槎种子已颇具通常星槎的规模了。哇哦。
t_en: Wow! A starskiff seed in the embryonic phase is already the size of a fully-grown starskiff.

t_ch: 或许可以将已具雏形的星槎种子称作「星槎幼苗」？不，星槎种子并不是真的种子，它不可能长成幼苗。
t_en: Can we call a starskiff seed in the embryonic phase a starskiff seedling? We can't. As a starskiff seed isn't a real seed, it can't possibly grow into a seedling.

t_ch: 形似枝条的生物材料就像鸟巢。它轻轻托起星槎种子，后者仿若亟待孵化的雏卵。
t_en: The biological materials in the shape of branches work like a nest which gently supports the starskiff seed; the latter looks like an egg waiting to hatch.

t_ch: 如果你急需一台座驾，处在这一阶段的星槎安装玦轮后即可自由移动——当然，廻星港的工人和天舶司可不会同意的。
t_en: If you desperately need a vehicle, you can use the starskiff in the current phase to travel around after fixing it with a jade wheel. Unfortunately, the Stargazer Navalia workers and the Sky-Faring Commission will not approve the practice.

t_ch: 星槎种子演化出了船身、龙骨、甚至船蓬——生物材料根据功能需要，演变成不同的结构。工人们通常将这一阶段称作「育成阶段」。
t_en: A hull, a keel, and even a canopy have evolved from the starskiff seed, as the biological materials will grow into different structural parts according to the needs. The workers refer to this phase as the "nutritive phase."

t_ch: 就目前的完成度来看，让星槎飞上天恐怕还有些难度——但是将它放在水里应该是能漂起来的。
t_en: It is unlikely that the starskiff can fly in its current condition. Still, it should be able to float if placed in the water.

t_ch: 与成型的星槎作比较，它的面貌反倒显得更加苍老，非常适合那些喜欢坐在船头举杯邀月的文学家。
t_en: Compared to a completed starskiff, it has an even more worn-out appearance. It is perfect for scholars who like to enjoy the view of the moon while having a drink on the deck.

t_ch: 你注意到它在船尾留下了安转玦轮的圆孔。如果就在这里装上电扇或者轮胎会怎样呢？
t_en: You notice some round holes left on the stern for the installation of a jade wheel. What will happen if an electric fan or a tire is fixed on the spot instead?

t_ch: 完成组装的星槎停靠在迴星港港口，等待着它的是驶向未来的旅程。
t_en: The fully assembled starskiff is docked at Stargazer Navalia. A journey to the future is awaiting it.

t_ch: 如果各种星槎配件不用组装上去，而是同样由星槎种子演化形成，效率是否会更高呢？星槎工程师真该好好考虑这个想法的。
t_en: Will the process be more efficient if the components are evolved from the starskiff seed instead of being fixed on it at a later time? It is something the starskiff engineers should ponder about.

t_ch: 回顾整个制造星槎的过程，你的脑中不禁蹦出了「工业化」三个字。那么，「工业化」到底是什么呢？
t_en: Looking back on the manufacturing process of starskiffs, the term "industrialization" pops up in your mind. So, what does it mean?

t_ch: 这些精美的星槎静静停靠在出港口。未来，它们可能因为醉驾、追尾、路怒等各种交通意外报废——你不禁为星槎未知的命运捏了一把汗。
t_en: These exquisite starskiffs parked by the dock might be reduced into a pile of metal scraps in the future due to accidents caused by drunk driving, tailgating, and road rage. At that thought, you can't help feeling apprehensive about their destiny.

t_ch: 这座香炉没有任何气味，大概只是装饰品。
t_en: This incense burner has no smell. It is probably just a decoration.

t_ch: 据说能够营造出适合卜者们专心推演的沉静氛围，但你不清楚它是如何工作的。
t_en: It is said to be able to create a calming atmosphere that helps the diviners to focus on their work. Yet, you are not sure how it works.

t_ch: 比起香炉更像是落地灯，但绝大多数卜者坚称它是一尊香炉。
t_en: It looks more like a floor lamp than an incense burner, but most diviners insist that it is the latter.

t_ch: 一尊造型古典的香炉。
t_en: It is an incense burner with a traditional design.

t_ch: 有棱有角的玉兆晶石，是大衍穷观阵的重要组分。
t_en: The angular jade abacus crystal is a key component of the Matrix of Prescience Ultima.

t_ch: 这块方形玉兆还没有录入任何信息，因此并未装入算机当中。
t_en: As no data has been entered into the square jade abacus, it is not fixed on the calculation device.

t_ch: 一尊方方正正的玉兆晶石。最好不要把它当作板凳——这可是精密仪器。
t_en: It is a square jade abacus crystal. Please bear in mind that it is a precise instrument, not a stool.

t_ch: 据称，篆刻于玉石晶格中的符篆和原理全都来自司「智识」命途的博识尊——那么，是否可以将这枚玉兆晶石视作星神的一部分呢？
t_en: The symbols and knowledge engraved on the jade abacus crystal are said to originate from the Nous, which is in charge of the Path of Erudition. So, is it safe to regard the jade abacus crystal as part of the Aeon?

t_ch: 此阵名为「宙合」，是大衍穷观阵的阵基之一，与其他阵基一同演绎着大衍万化之道。
t_en: This matrix is called the "temporal plane," and it is one of the base terminals of the Matrix of Prescience Ultima. Along with other base terminals, it carries out the way of all change.

t_ch: 检索「时间」的阵基，可以从变幻莫测的时间洪流中标定出与检索对象相关的时刻。
t_en: This is a base terminal of time. It can filter the moments relating to your target by searching from the unpredictable flow of time.

t_ch: 阵基如同从宇宙万事万物中接受信号的接受器，只有通过特定的阵型才能锁定特定的信息阵列。
t_en: The base terminal functions as a receiver that detects signals from everything in the universe. Only through the use of specific matrices can you locate the strings of information you need.

t_ch: 只有能量石的排列与大衍万象的昭示协同一致，阵基才能检索出对应的消息。
t_en: The relevant information can only be obtained when the energy stones are arranged in a pattern similar to the shape shown in the Mutare Magnus.

t_ch: 此阵名为「界寰」，是大衍穷观阵的阵基之一，与其他阵基一同演绎着大衍万化之道。
t_en: This matrix is called the "Spatial Terminal," and it is one of the base terminals of the Matrix of Prescience Ultima. Along with other base terminals, it carries out the way of all change.

t_ch: 检索「空间」的阵基，可以从寰宇诸界已知的全部地理信息中筛选出与检索对象相关的经纬。
t_en: This is a base terminal of space. It can filter the coordinates relating to your target by searching from all the known geographical information in the universe.

t_ch: 阵基如同从宇宙万事万物中接受信号的接受器，只有通过特定的阵型才能锁定特定的信息阵列。
t_en: The base terminal functions as a receiver that detects signals from everything in the universe. Only through the use of specific matrices can you locate the strings of information you need.

t_ch: 只有能量石的排列与大衍万象的昭示协同一致，阵基才能检索出对应的消息。
t_en: The relevant information can only be obtained when the energy stones are arranged in a pattern similar to the shape shown in the Mutare Magnus.

t_ch: 此阵名为「业成」，是大衍穷观阵的阵基之一，与其他阵基一同演绎着大衍万化之道。
t_en: This matrix is called the "Karma Terminal," and it is one of the base terminals of the Matrix of Prescience Ultima. Along with other base terminals, it carries out the way of all change.

t_ch: 检索「因果」的阵基，可以从古往今来无数事件中勾连出与检索对象相关的因果。
t_en: This is a base terminal of karma. It can filter the karma relating to your target by searching from all the events that have taken place in the past and present.

t_ch: 阵基如同从宇宙万事万物中接受信号的接受器，只有通过特定的阵型才能锁定特定的信息阵列。
t_en: The base terminal functions as a receiver that detects signals from everything in the universe. Only through the use of specific matrices can you locate the strings of information you need.

t_ch: 只有能量石的排列与大衍万象的昭示协同一致，阵基才能检索出对应的消息。
t_en: The relevant information can only be obtained when the energy stones are arranged in a pattern similar to the shape shown in the Mutare Magnus.

t_ch: 存放展阅的立柜，空间利用率属实不高。
t_en: A cabinet used for storing flexible displays with a poor space utilization rate.

t_ch: 储存了太卜司机要的诸多展阅，若想阅读必须获得太卜许可。
t_en: It stores many classified flexible displays of the Divination Commission. You must have permission from the master diviner to read them.

t_ch: 存放展阅的立柜，看起来倒像是某种热兵器。凭你对仙舟科技的了解，这种想法很可能是真的。
t_en: A cabinet used for storing flexible displays that look like some sort of thermal weapon. Based on your understanding of Xianzhou technology, you know your suspicion might be true.

t_ch: 收纳齐整的展阅，还是不要乱动为好。
t_en: It's best not to touch the neat array of flexible displays.

t_ch: 工造司能源之本「造化洪炉」，驱动着整个司部的正常运转。
t_en: The Creation Furnace provides energy to the Artisanship Commission and ensures its normal operation.

t_ch: 传闻中，造化洪炉中封存的能源是元素生命「岁阳」——它们在千年前进犯仙舟未果，由此被判令永世为仙舟联盟供应能源。
t_en: Rumor has it that the energy stored in the Creation Furnace is heliobus, an elemental being. A thousand years ago, the heliobi unsuccessfully attacked Xianzhou and was thus ordered to supply energy to the Xianzhou Alliance forever.

t_ch: 建木根须渴求着能量，因此破土而出，侵入了可怜的洪炉。
t_en: The roots of Ambrosial Arbor, which desperately need energy, rise from the soil and invade the poor furnace.

t_ch: 建木根须深入熔炉内部，贪婪地汲取「岁阳」的岁精能量，如同不知疲倦的抽水泵。
t_en: The roots of Ambrosial Arbor creep into the inside of the furnace where they absorb the heliobi's energy tirelessly like a water pump.

t_ch: 「内有金人守卫——请勿擅闯，后果自负。」
t_en: "This place is guarded by the aurumatons. Keep off at your peril."

t_ch: 工造司曾经指定谛听负责工造司重地守备，但它实在是过于可爱，便很快被凶恶的金人淘汰掉了。
t_en: The Artisanship Commission once appointed Diting to be in charge of the defense of the commission. However, it was soon replaced by the intimidating-looking aurumatons for looking too adorable.

t_ch: 「精密仪器，请勿触摸。」
t_en: "This is a precision instrument. Please do not touch."

t_ch: 旨在防止无关人员随意触摸精密仪器的宣传画。这种做法很有道理，毕竟谁也不能保证自己能打得过工造司制造的精密仪器。
t_en: The poster is designed to deter unauthorized personnel from touching the precision instrument. It is a reasonable measure, as no one can be sure that they can overcome the precision instruments made by the Artisanship Commission.

t_ch: 曾有人因随意触动穹仪导致洞天重力失常，令一半罗浮人罹患航天综合征——人们都说那是一场医学奇迹。
t_en: Someone once touched the Meridian Pin and caused a gravity anomaly in the delve. Because of that, half of the Luofu population suffered from spaceflight syndrome — a situation regarded by many as a miracle in the medical field.

t_ch: 不要随意触碰精密仪器。如果你执意如此，那么最好先给自己买好保险。
t_en: Do not touch the precision instruments. If you insist on doing so, you'd better get yourself insured first.

t_ch: 「金人偃偶，匠人赋魂——金人蓝图设计大赛招募中。」
t_en: "Bring your aurumaton puppet to life! The Aurumaton Design Competition is looking for contestants."

t_ch: 金人设计大赛包括了蓝图设计、胶板制作、零件组装、渗线喷涂、特效绘制、地台搭建等多个环节。如果你囊中羞涩，那最好别碰这个。
t_en: The Aurumaton Design Competition consists of various phases such as blueprint design, glue board making, parts assembly, hollow lines inking, special effects design, platform construction, etc. Do not be a part of this if you are not loaded.

t_ch: 金人设计大赛的宣传画。看来工造司的工作时间一定不饱和。
t_en: It is the poster for the Aurumaton Design Competition. It seems like those working at the Artisanship Commission have quite a lot of free time.

t_ch: 状如巨大卷轴的蓝图——仙舟民能把任何东西设计成卷轴的样子。
t_en: The blueprint is in the shape of a gigantic scroll. The Xianzhou citizens are capable of turning anything into a scroll.

t_ch: 工造司格物院设计的巨大蓝图，可能会在不久的将来变成金人偃偶找你切磋。
t_en: The gigantic blueprint is the brainchild of the Artisanship Commission's Sapientia Academe. It might turn into a giant aurumaton puppet that spars with you soon.

t_ch: 蓝图上绘制着各式各样的金人零件，颇具工业美感。
t_en: The wide array of aurumaton parts drawn on the blueprint is beautiful in the industrial sense.

t_ch: 在工造司，你甚至能看到正在疯狂内卷的蓝图。
t_en: At the Artisanship Commission, you can even gaze in wonder at the impossibly coiled blueprints.

t_ch: 不会动的金人就是好金人。
t_en: An aurumaton that doesn't move is a good aurumaton.

t_ch: 这台金人比你亲手粉碎的那些要稳重些——至少它们不会随意招惹你。
t_en: This aurumaton is more sensible than the one you destroyed; at least it won't mess with you for no reason.

t_ch: 这台金人正在享受它难得的美梦，还是不要去打扰它了。
t_en: Let's not wake the aurumaton up from its nice dream.

t_ch: 你很少见到如此安分守己的金人，且看且珍惜。
t_en: Such a well-behaved aurumaton is a rare find. You should appreciate it.

t_ch: 案牍库上的铭牌显示：「大敌名录」。
t_en: The plate on the file repository reads, "List of Archenemies."

t_ch: 你尝试触碰卷轴，手指碰到了无形的阻碍。看来你需要获得许可。
t_en: You reach out to the scroll, but your fingers are stopped by an invisible barrier. It seems like you need to get permission to touch it.

t_ch: 这一列案牍库的铭牌上标注着「大敌 • 孽物」。
t_en: The plate on this file repository is labeled "Nemesis — Abomination."

t_ch: 你信手抽出了其中一枚卷轴。展开时，一个丝绢质感的合成声音自你脑内成形。
t_en: You pull out a random scroll. When you open it, a synthetic voice as smooth as silk forms in your mind.

t_ch: 「步离人，灵长目 • 人科 • 犬亚种。丰饶之民中最强盛的一支，也是仙舟联盟长久以来的大敌。」
t_en: "Borisin: Primate, hominid, canine subspecies. They are the most powerful race of the Denizens of Abundance and have long been the arch nemeses of the Xianzhou Alliance."

t_ch: 「步离人具有部分犬类的解剖学特征。能征善战，擅以生物科技制造武器、铠甲甚至飞船，奴役并改造其他智慧种族在诸多星球间进行劫掠。」
t_en: "Borisin have some anatomical features of canines. Besides being valiant fighters, they excel at making weapons, armor, and even spaceships using biological technologies. They enslave and modify other intelligent races to attack and plunder other planets."

t_ch: 「至目前为止，步离人为首的丰饶之民联军至少与仙舟发生过三次大规模战争。随着前任战首被云骑拘囚，其势力大不如前……」
t_en: "The coalition of the Denizens of Abundance led by the borisin has had at least three large-scale wars with Xianzhou. Now, the coalition has become a shadow of its former self, following the capture and imprisonment of its former Warhead by the Cloud Knights..."

t_ch: 这一列案牍库的铭牌上标注着「大敌 • 孽物」。

t_ch: 你信手抽出了其中一枚卷轴。展开时，一个丝绢质感的合成声音自你脑内成形。
t_en: You pull out a random scroll. When you open it, a synthetic voice as smooth as silk forms in your mind.

t_ch: 「造翼者，灵长目 • 人科 • 有羽亚种。丰饶之民中的一支。其记录上可追溯至仙舟启航前的『古国时代』。」
t_en: "Wingweavers: Primates, hominid, winged subspecies. They are one of the races of the Denizens of Abundance. Their history can be traced back to the Primeval Imperium Age before Xianzhou set sail."

t_ch: 「造翼者栖居于被称为『穹桑』的树状人工世界中，以其探出的『枝梢』跃迁至其他星球，夺取其上的资源。」
t_en: "Wingweavers live in a tree-like artificial world called 'Muldrasil.' From the protruding branches, they can warp to other planets and plunder the resources there."

t_ch: 「在造翼者文化中，不具备飞行能力的陆行生物均被称为『尘民』，而他们则自诩『云君』，奴役其他智慧种族为其生产、修葺穹桑。」
t_en: "In the culture of wingweavers, terrestrial animals that cannot fly are called 'Residents of Dirt,' while they call themselves the 'Cloudlords.' They enslave other intelligent races and make them produce resources and work on Muldrasil."

t_ch: 「随着反物质军团在宇宙中的肆虐，造翼者的根据地一度遭受极其惨重的破坏。穹桑被伐倒，而造翼者也成了丰饶之民中少见的雇佣兵种族……」
t_en: "After the Antimatter Legion took over the universe, the wingweavers' base of operations suffered severe damage. Muldrasil was cut down, and the wingweavers became a minority mercenary race among the Denizens of Abundance..."

t_en: You pull out a random scroll. When you open it, a synthetic voice as smooth as silk forms in your mind.

t_ch: 「慧骃，灵长目 • 人科 • 有蹄亚种。丰饶之民中的一支。」
t_en: "Houyhnhnms: Primate, hominid, ungulate subspecies. They are one of the races of the Denizens of Abundance."

t_ch: 「慧骃一族为六肢动物，保有类似马匹的健硕躯干，后四肢着地，极善奔驰。」
t_en: "Houyhnhnms are six-legged animals with a muscular torso that looks like one of a horse. Their four hind limbs on the ground make them fast runners."

t_ch: 「受步离人的蛊惑，慧骃族常常担任其冲锋时的先驱，身着生物外骨骼装甲，能在冲撞间轻易击杀敌人。」
t_en: "Houyhnhnms are often induced by the borisin into acting as the forerunners at the frontline. They can kill enemies easily by ramming into them with their exoskeleton armor."

t_ch: 「有观点认为，反物质军团中『践踏者』的出现，意味着慧骃原有的文明遭受了反物质军团的打击和奴役……」
t_en: "Some view the emergence of Tramplers in the Antimatter Legion signifies the erosion and enslavement of the Houyhnhnm civilization by the Antimatter Legion..."

t_ch: 你信手抽出了其中一枚卷轴。展开时，一个丝绢质感的合成声音自你脑内成形。
t_en: You pull out a random scroll. When you open it, a synthetic voice as smooth as silk forms in your mind.

t_ch: 「岁阳，无形目 • 魂精科 • 岁阳亚种。世外妖魔族类的一支。」
t_en: "Heliobi: Shapeless, spirit essence, heliobi subspecies. They are one of the races of the Extraneous Demons."

t_ch: 「岁阳一族为不定形的纯能量生物，充满恶意，极为致命。其记录上可追溯至仙舟漂泊的『孤航时代』。岁阳降临仙舟，引发了『夺舍之祸』的一系列灾难。」
t_en: "Heliobi are shapeless creatures formed of pure energy. The history of this hostile and deadly creature can be traced back to the 'Lone Voyage Era' when Xianzhou was still wandering around. The arrival of heliobi in Xianzhou has triggered the 'Possession Tragedy.'"

t_ch: 「岁阳喜好寄生于有形身躯（通常为泛人类智慧种族），感应神经系统随情感而生的诸多变化。这种吃掉七情六欲的行为，会令不具形体的岁阳感到满足。」
t_en: "Heliobi like to parasitize physical bodies (usually those of the pan-human intelligent races) to experience the changes in the nervous system following different emotions. The shapeless heliobi take pleasure in feeding on emotions."

t_ch: 「在火劫大战尾声，岁阳一族已遭彻底禁绝。即便仅有极少数尚存于朱明仙舟之上……」
t_en: "Heliobi were wiped out toward the end of the Flaming Catastrophe. A small number of them could still be found on the Xianzhou Zhuming."

t_en: You pull out a random scroll. When you open it, a synthetic voice as smooth as silk forms in your mind.

t_ch: 「视肉，原质目 • 原虫科 • 胶状原虫亚种。世外妖魔族类的一支。」
t_en: "Viscorpus: Eukaryote, protozoan, colloidal protozoan subspecies. They are one of the races of the Extraneous Demons."

t_ch: 「视肉是具有变形和增生能力的胶状原虫，智慧虽低，但极为致命。其行动模式与其说是敌人，不如说是一种病原体。」
t_en: "Viscorpi are a colloidal protozoan with the ability to change into different shapes and reproduce. Despite their low intelligence, they are extremely deadly. They attack like a pathogen instead of an enemy."

t_ch: 「关于视肉的最早记录上可追溯至仙舟漂泊的『孤航时代』。岱舆与圆峤两座仙舟均曾受视肉侵蚀，人口锐减。」
t_en: "The earliest record of viscorpi can be traced back to the Lone Voyage Era when Xianzhou was wandering around. The population of the Daiyu and the Yuanqiao once declined drastically due to the corrosion of viscorpi."

t_ch: 「联盟与步离人交战过程中发现，视肉本是步离人所控制的畜牧产物。但在变异失控后，步离人放任其成为肆虐星间的灾害。云骑军经年铲除，视肉这一大患已逐渐绝迹……」
t_en: "Amid a war against the borisin, the alliance discovered that viscorpi were once a kind of livestock controlled by the borisin. After the mutation went out of control, the borisin did nothing to stop the dangerous creatures from ravaging the planets. It took the Cloud Knights years to eliminate them. Now, viscorpi have gradually become eradicated..."

t_ch: 你信手抽出其中一枚卷轴。展开时，一个丝绢质感的合成声音自你脑内成形。
t_en: You pull out a random scroll. When you open it, a synthetic voice as smooth as silk forms in your mind.

t_ch: 「绝灭大君，是『烬灭祸祖』纳努克所擢选的令使，「反物质军团」众多部队的领军者。他们受赐毁灭之力，为诸世界带去死亡和破灭。」
t_en: "The Lord Ravagers are the Emanators chosen by Nanook, the Ruin Author, and are the leaders of the Antimatter Legion troops. They are given the power of Destruction to bring death and havoc to worlds."

t_ch: 「相传纳努克座下共有七位大君，分别代表『毁灭』命途的七种极致倾向。」
t_en: "Rumor has it that Nanook has seven Lord Ravagers, each representing one of the seven extremes of Destruction."

t_ch: 「但有效情报甚少，其中至少仍有四位不知其名。太卜司仅能从各种观测记录与情报中推知其存在。」
t_en: "There is little information available about them, and the names of at least four of them are still unknown. The Divination Commission can only infer their existence from various observational records and intel."

t_ch: 这一列案牍库的铭牌上标注着「大敌 • 烬灭」。
t_en: The plate on this file repository is labeled "Nemesis — Ruin."

t_ch: 你信手抽出其中一枚卷轴。展开时，一个丝绢质感的合成声音自你脑内成形。
t_en: You pull out a random scroll. When you open it, a synthetic voice as smooth as silk forms in your mind.

t_ch: 「作为纳努克座下七位大君之一，『焚风』痴迷于事物在毁灭瞬间所爆发的力量与美感。他所拥有的力量，也足以让他取代千军万马，对一个世界下达死亡判决。」
t_en: "As one of the Seven Ravagers, Zephyro is obsessed with the power and beauty of the moment of destruction. Being as powerful as an army, he is capable of destroying worlds at will."

t_ch: 「曾点燃新伯利恒的太阳，以巨量辐射炙烤其地表，使之玻璃化；曾在亚甸星上掀起巨大的气旋，将其生态系统破坏殆尽……」
t_en: "He once ignited the sun of New Bethlehem, vitrifying its planetary surface with a huge amount of radiation. He once also created a gigantic vortex on Aedirn, dealing a devastating blow to its ecosystem..."

t_ch: 「焚风的出现预示着一颗星球即将经历最壮丽、也是最为迅速的毁灭。」
t_en: "The appearance of Zephyro signals that a planet will soon undergo its magnificent and rapid destruction."

t_ch: 这一列案牍库的铭牌上标注着「大敌 • 烬灭」。
t_en: The plate on this file repository is labeled "Nemesis — Ruin."

t_ch: 你信手抽出其中一枚卷轴。展开时，一个丝绢质感的合成声音自你脑内成形。
t_en: You pull out a random scroll. When you open it, a synthetic voice as smooth as silk forms in your mind.

t_ch: 「星啸是反物质军团的先锋将军，也是烬灭祸祖最常派遣的大君。其部队遍布银河，在群星间织出行军路径和毁灭的道路。」
t_en: "Celenova is the front-line general of the Antimatter Legion and the Lord Ravager most frequently dispatched by the Ruin Author. Her troops, scattered all over the cosmos, march to and fro among the planets as they bring about destruction."

t_ch: 「星啸所率部属与曜青、朱明与方壶仙舟的先遣部队均有交战记录。在云骑无畏的战斗下，她的计划并未得逞。」
t_en: "Celenova's troops have engaged in warfare with the troops of the Yaoqing, the Zhuming, and the Fanghu. Her plans were derailed by the Cloud Knights, who fought fearlessly."

t_ch: 这一列案牍库的铭牌上标注着「大敌 • 烬灭」。
t_en: The plate on this file repository is labeled "Nemesis — Ruin."

t_ch: 你信手抽出其中一枚卷轴。展开时，一个丝绢质感的合成声音自你脑内成形。
t_en: You pull out a random scroll. When you open it, a synthetic voice as smooth as silk forms in your mind.

t_ch: 「许多世界均自信于发达的科技所向无敌，尤其是公司所辖之处。但『铁墓』证明了他们的盲目乐观。」
t_en: "Many worlds, especially those under the corporation's control, believe that advanced technology has made them invincible. However, Irontomb has proven them wrong."

t_ch: 「在反物质军团入侵高度文明的世界时，纳努克会优先派出铁墓『静默』其科技。」
t_en: "When the Antimatter Legion is invading a highly civilized world, Nanook will first dispatch Irontomb to nullify its technology."

t_ch: 「所有生还者的证言都指出，用于捍卫行星的科技会陷入崩溃紊乱，最终甚至倒戈指向主人，受污染的通信频道中只回荡着几个词『智慧的溃败』」
t_en: "According to the survivors, the technology used to protect a planet will collapse and eventually even turn against its owner. In the corrupted communication channel, a voice echoes, 'The failure of knowledge.'"

t_ch: 这一列案牍库的铭牌上标注着「大敌 • 烬灭」。

t_ch: 你信手抽出其中一枚卷轴。展开时，一个丝绢质感的合成声音自你脑内成形。
t_en: You pull out a random scroll. When you open it, a synthetic voice as smooth as silk forms in your mind.

t_ch: 「星历<unbreak>7200</unbreak>-<unbreak>8100</unbreak>年间，星际和平公司共观察到了一百二十二个世界陷入不明原因的混乱，最终它们被反物质军团全数击溃。」
t_en: "In the years of <unbreak>7200</unbreak> to <unbreak>8100</unbreak> SC, the Interastral Peace Corporation saw <unbreak>122</unbreak> worlds falling into chaos due to unknown reasons. All of them were eventually destroyed by the Antimatter Legion."

t_ch: 「所有世界的灭亡都归结于同一个原因：内部信仰体系的冲突、精神支柱的幻灭、弃绝希望。」
t_en: "The destruction of the worlds stem from the same reasons: Conflict of their internal belief system, disillusionment with their pillars of support, and the lack of hope."

t_ch: 「可以说，在反物质军团登陆前，这些世界早已是失去灵魂的空壳了。无人知晓这是哪位大君的手笔，也无人知道这些混乱是如何发生的。」
t_en: "In other words, these worlds were already past their heydays before the Antimatter Legion even arrived. It was unknown which Lord Ravager was the culprit behind the chaos and how it happened."

t_ch: 「星历<unbreak>7200</unbreak>-<unbreak>8100</unbreak>年间，星际和平公司共观察到了一百二十二个世界陷入不明原因的混乱，最终它们被反物质军团全数击溃。」
t_en: "In the years of <unbreak>7200</unbreak> to <unbreak>8100</unbreak> SC, the Interastral Peace Corporation saw <unbreak>122</unbreak> worlds falling into chaos due to unknown reasons. All of them were eventually destroyed by the Antimatter Legion."

t_ch: 「所有世界的灭亡都归结于同一个原因：内部信仰体系的冲突、精神支柱的幻灭、弃绝希望。可以说，在反物质军团登陆前，这些世界早已是失去灵魂的空壳了。」
t_en: "The destruction of the worlds stem from the same reasons: Conflict of their internal belief system, disillusionment with their pillars of support, and the lack of hope. In other words, these worlds were already past their heydays before the Antimatter Legion even arrived."

t_ch: 「就在罗浮最近发生的星核灾变后，联盟已判明上述事件均由名为『幻胧』的绝灭大君一手操纵。」
t_en: "Since the Stellaron incident that recently took place on the Luofu, the alliance has concluded that the disaster was orchestrated by a Lord Ravager named Phantylia."

t_ch: 这一列案牍库的铭牌上标注着「大敌 • 烬灭」。

t_ch: 你信手抽出其中一枚卷轴。展开时，一个丝绢质感的合成声音自你脑内成形。
t_en: You pull out a random scroll. When you open it, a synthetic voice as smooth as silk forms in your mind.

t_ch: 「叙拉古-III、赤色巴别、奥古尔星环等已死星球的灭亡过程证明，军团中并非只有一意破坏的疯子。」
t_en: "From the destruction process of dead planets such as Syracuse-III, Red Babel, and the Ogul ring, we can see that there are people in the legion who are not only keen on destruction."

t_ch: 「在上述星球的毁灭进程中，军团极为缓慢地推进阵线，构筑优势，施加压力，蚕食抵抗者，又如同观察蚁群一般，观察受难文明在各个结构上的瓦解。」
t_en: "During the destruction of the above planets, the legion advanced, dominated, pressured, and devoured the resisters at an extremely slow speed. They took their time to watch the structural collapse of civilization during a disaster like observing an ant colony."

t_ch: 「可以推测其幕后隐有一位如棋手般冷静自持的大君，引导着战事发展，并在缓杀慢死的过程中对受害文明详加研究。」
t_en: "From that, we could assume there was a Lord Ravager as calm and composed as a chess player behind the scenes. He or she did thorough research on civilization going through a disaster during the gradual destruction process."

t_ch: 这一列案牍库的铭牌上标注着「大敌 • 烬灭」。
t_en: The plate on this file repository is labeled "Nemesis — Ruin."

t_ch: 你信手抽出其中一枚卷轴。展开时，一个丝绢质感的合成声音自你脑内成形。
t_en: You pull out a random scroll. When you open it, a synthetic voice as smooth as silk forms in your mind.

t_ch: 「反物质军团留下的最骇人听闻的罪行之一，是雅梵娜之链星区熄灭了三分之一的恒星。」
t_en: "One of the most appalling sins committed by the Antimatter Legion is the extinction of a third of the stars in the Yvanna chain."

t_ch: 「博识学会的报告指出，基于恒星的体积与其天文距离，灭星武器在短时间内不可能造成如此规模的影响。」
t_en: "The Intelligentsia Guild report pointed out that the star destroyer arsenals could not have caused such a massive impact in such a short time, considering the size of the stars and the distance between them."

t_ch: 「根据曜青派遣的云骑军送回情报，该星区间许多真空地带被某种吸光的不明絮状物质填充。天舶司的天象学士达成共识，某种存在『吞食』了那些恒星。」
t_en: "According to the intel collected by the Cloud Knights from the Yaoqing, a lot of the vacuum spaces in the Yvanna chain were filled by an unidentified light-absorbing flocculent material. The astrologists of Sky-Faring Commission reached a consensus that some beings had devoured those stars."

t_ch: 「将这一异象归咎于反物质军团而非其他原因，是因为在雅梵娜之链的这些暗区里，军团紧随黑暗的脚步，消灭了那些抵抗世界。」
t_en: "The unusual occurrence was attributed to the Antimatter Legion. It was because the legion followed the dark areas in the Yvanna chain and wiped out the resisting worlds there."

t_ch: 「我们猜测，这是某位绝灭大君的手笔，而不是此前未曾记录的天体现象。」
t_en: "We suspect that it was the doing of one of the Lord Ravagers, instead of an unrecorded astronomical event."

t_ch: 这一列案牍库的铭牌上标注着「大敌 • 烬灭」。
t_en: The plate on this file repository is labeled "Nemesis — Ruin."

t_ch: 你信手抽出其中一枚卷轴。展开时，一个丝绢质感的合成声音自你脑内成形。
t_en: You pull out a random scroll. When you open it, a synthetic voice as smooth as silk forms in your mind.

t_ch: 「许多被反物质军团所消灭的文明物种，最后都会以某种扭曲的形态重新出现在军团中，例如践踏者或虚卒。」
t_en: "Many species that have been eliminated by the Antimatter Legion will end up in the legion in some distorted form, such as the Tramplers and the Voidrangers."

t_ch: 「在被摧毁的瞬间，这些军团造物都会迸发出激烈的逆火，将敌人一同拖入湮灭。」
t_en: "When destroyed, these creations of the legion will implode with an intense backfire, dragging their enemies along with them to their destruction."

t_ch: 「虽然没有明确的证据，但类似的结构不仅出现在军团造物的身体上，在一些受其摧毁的行星上，也会出现类似的虚数流溢现象。」
t_en: "Although there is no clear evidence to prove it, we can see similar structures on the body of the legion creations. Signs of reversed-progeria are also found on some destroyed planets."

t_ch: 「根据过往的交战记录，我们暂时将此判定为某位大君的能力所致。」
t_en: "Based on the records of past engagements, we deduce that the phenomenon is caused by the power of a Lord Ravager."

t_ch: 盟友，星际和平公司
t_en: Ally — Interastral Peace Corporation

t_ch: 这一列案牍库的铭牌上标注着「盟助 • 公司」。
t_en: The plate on this file repository is labeled "Ally — Interastral Peace Corporation."

t_ch: 你信手抽出其中一枚卷轴。展开时，一个丝绢质感的合成声音自你脑内成形。
t_en: You pull out a random scroll. When you open it, a synthetic voice as smooth as silk forms in your mind.

t_ch: 「星际和平公司，首屈一指的泛银河超巨型贸易企业。其业务遍布众多文明世界，并实际掌控了上万颗星球的文明运转，以『补天司命』克里珀的名义保护了兆亿生灵。」
t_en: "The Interastral Peace Corporation (IPC) is a top-notch pan-cosmic mega enterprise. It has a foothold in many worlds and is in control of the civilizations of over ten thousand planets. In the name of Qlipoth, the Firmamend Arbiter, they keep trillions of living beings under protection."

t_ch: 「仙舟与星际和平公司的盟谊缔结于星历<unbreak>2022</unbreak>年。通过被称为『歌民』的行商民族引介，仙舟成为了泛银河贸易网络中的重要一员。」
t_en: "The alliance between Xianzhou and the IPC was formed in <unbreak>2022</unbreak> SC. The Balladians, a mercantile race, acted as a go-between and helped Xianzhou become an important member of the pan-cosmic business network."

t_ch: 「公司在星际争端方面抱持极端谨慎的中立态度，同盟关系仅存在贸易与信息交换可能，无法在战争层面期望其援助。」
t_en: "IPC adopts a cautious and neutral stance in interstellar disputes. As the corporation only trades and exchanges information related to business with its allies, gaining its support in war is out of the question."

t_ch: 盟友，星际和平公司•总部
t_en: Ally — Interastral Peace Corporation Headquarters

t_ch: 这一列案牍库的铭牌上标注着「盟助 • 公司」。
t_en: The plate on this file repository is labeled "Ally — Interastral Peace Corporation."

t_ch: 你信手抽出其中一枚卷轴。展开时，一个丝绢质感的合成声音自你脑内成形。
t_en: You pull out a random scroll. When you open it, a synthetic voice as smooth as silk forms in your mind.

t_ch: 「星际和平公司总部计有七个部门：『市场开拓部』、『业务巩固部』、『战略投资部』、『筑材物流部』、『技术研发部』、『人才激励部』、『传统项目部』。」
t_en: "The headquarters of the IPC consists of seven departments: Marketing Development Department, Business Consolidation Department, Strategic Investment Department, Building Material Logistics Department, Technology Department, Talent Motivation Department, and Traditional Project Department."

t_ch: 「『市场开拓部』，主管：奥斯瓦尔多•施耐德，董事会理事候补。资历较浅，『存护』狂热分子，扩张主义者。对联盟潜在危害：高。」
t_en: "Head of Marketing Development: Oswaldo Schneider, a board member candidate. He is inexperienced, a Preservation zealot, and an expansionist. Potential threat level to the alliance: High."

t_ch: 「『业务巩固部』，主管：疤眼夫人，董事会理事。对联盟潜在危害：极低。」
t_en: "Head of Business Consolidation: Madam Scarred Eye, a board member. Potential threat level to the alliance: Very low."

t_ch: 「『战略投资部』，主管：『钻石』，董事会理事候补，下设使者团体『不良资产清算专家』。对联盟潜在危害：低。」
t_en: "Head of Strategic Investment: Diamond, a board member candidate, founded the subordinate organization 'Non-Performing Asset Liquidation Specialist.' Potential threat level to the Alliance: Low."

t_ch: 「『筑材物流部』，主管：塔拉梵•基恩，董事会理事。非『存护』信仰者？资料不明。对联盟潜在危害：极低。」
t_en: "Head of Building Material Logistics: Taravan Keane, a board member. Not a Preservation believer? No clear evidence is found. Potential threat level to the alliance: Very low."

t_ch: 「『技术研发部』，主管：亚婆离。博识学会实际控制者，对联盟潜在危害：极低。」
t_en: "Head of Technology: Yabuli, the de facto controller of the Intelligentsia Guild. Potential threat level to the alliance: Very low."

t_ch: 「『人才激励部』，主管：姆托尤因•拉杰•扎扎德、阎世罗。后者出身联盟，对仙舟态度不明，需警惕？对联盟潜在危害：中。」
t_en: "Head of Talent Motivation: Mtooyin Raj Zazzad and Yan Shiluo. The latter comes from the Alliance and has an unclear stance toward Xianzhou. Should we be careful? Potential threat level to the alliance: Medium."

t_ch: 「『传统项目部』，主管：在田，董事会理事。对联盟潜在危害：低。」
t_en: "Head of Traditional Projects: Arita, a board member. Potential threat level to the alliance: Low."

t_ch: 这一列案牍库的铭牌上标注着「盟助 • 学会」。
t_en: The plate on this file repository is labeled "Ally — Intelligentsia Guild."

t_ch: 你信手抽出其中一枚卷轴。展开时，一个丝绢质感的合成声音自你脑内成形。
t_en: You pull out a random scroll. When you open it, a synthetic voice as smooth as silk forms in your mind.

t_ch: 「博识学会，首屈一指的泛银河学术研究组织。博识学会持之以恒地促进全宇宙的文明交流、技术与专利贸易，将『遍智天君』博识尊的智慧之光洒向黑暗角落。」
t_en: "The Intelligentsia Guild is a top-notch pan-cosmic academic research organization. The guild consistently promotes the exchange of knowledge and technology as well as the trading of patents across the universe, aiming to illuminate the dark areas with the wisdom of Nous, the Wisdomwalker."

t_ch: 「在联盟对抗丰饶孽物的征程中，博识学会曾于星历<unbreak>5749</unbreak>年派遣博学士军团加入第二次丰饶民战争，协助击退了围困玉阙仙舟的丰饶令使『倏忽』。」
t_en: "During the resistance of the alliance against the Abominations of Abundance, the guild once dispatched a troop consisting of the Learned to join the 2nd of the Abundance Wars in <unbreak>5749</unbreak> SC. The troop helped in defeating Shuhu, an Abundance Emanator that besieged the Yuque."

t_ch: 「通过与博识学会的互助协议，仙舟联盟始终紧追科技发展的脚步，帮助受丰饶侵蚀的世界修复生态，重返昔日生机。」
t_en: "Through the mutual aid contract with the Intelligentsia Guild, the Xianzhou Alliance keeps abreast of the latest technological developments to help the worlds eroded by Abundance with their recovery and restoration."

t_ch: 这一列案牍库的铭牌上标注着「盟助 • 游侠」。
t_en: The plate on this file repository is labeled "Ally — Rangers."

t_ch: 你信手抽出其中一枚卷轴。展开时，一个丝绢质感的合成声音自你脑内成形。
t_en: You pull out a random scroll. When you open it, a synthetic voice as smooth as silk forms in your mind.

t_ch: 「巡海游侠，同样奉行『帝弓司命』的天旨行事的游侠组织。巡海游侠主张实现人类最朴素的公义，驱除暴恶。」
t_en: "The Galaxy Rangers are a group of rangers that abides by the Reignbow Arbiter. They advocate human justice and the elimination of evil."

t_ch: 「其义举包括——借残余虫群制造的混乱，刺杀绝灭大君诛罗（由星啸取代）……」
t_en: "Their noble deeds include the assassination of Zulo the Lord Ravager (replaced by Celenova) during the chaos created by the remaining Swarms..."

t_ch: 「挫败帝皇鲁珀特意志的继承者『僭主』盖乌斯的十三军团（其手法至今未明）……」
t_en: "Defeating the Thirteenth Legion of Gaius the tyrant, the successor of Emperor Rubert's will (by unknown means)..."

t_ch: 「天才俱乐部#64原始博士试图对翁瓦克施行『返祖计划』时，巡海游侠阻止了此人的计划，也保护了万木之林。」
t_en: "Thwarting the attempted rebellion by the <unbreak>64</unbreak>th member of the Genius Society, Dr. Primitive and protecting the Thousand-Tree Greenwood."

t_ch: 「有人声称，在这一事件中许多游侠受退化溯流影响，失去了战斗力。为了赡养这些同伴，巡海游侠的活动频率不得不减少。」
t_en: "It has been claimed that many Rangers were affected by the Degeneration Flow and lost their combat ability. To support the living of these affected companions, the Galaxy Rangers had no choice but to cut back on their activities."

t_ch: 「目前，玉阙仙舟正在搜寻义侠之首拉曼查的下落，希望与之重新建立联系。」
t_en: "The Yuque is currently searching for the leader of the Rangers, La Mancha, hoping to rebuild a connection with the group."

t_ch: 这一列案牍库的铭牌上标注着「盟助 • 世界」。
t_en: The plate on this file repository is labeled "Ally — World."

t_ch: 你信手抽出其中一枚卷轴。展开时，一个丝绢质感的合成声音自你脑内成形。
t_en: You pull out a random scroll. When you open it, a synthetic voice as smooth as silk forms in your mind.

t_ch: 「受『寿瘟祸祖』侵蚀的世界散落于银河各处，这些世界原本具有各自多样的生态系统和文明，但在药师行过后却一律坠入了长生诅咒，在孽物折磨下行将崩溃。」
t_en: "The worlds suffering from the corrosion of the Plagues Author are scattered across the cosmos. These worlds, which initially had diverse ecosystems and civilizations, have fallen under a curse of immortality following Yaoshi's corrosion and succumbed to the torture of abominations."

t_ch: 「长时间来，联盟一直计划帮助那些世界修复横遭篡改的生态系统与基因系谱。其名如下——」
t_en: "The alliance has always intended to help these worlds restore their tampered ecosystem and genealogy. The names of the worlds are as follows:"

t_ch: 「塔拉萨，渊海世界；奥布瓦尔，幽魂星；绿丘，微型盆栽星球；日耀-XIII，带状星环殖民地……」
t_en: "Thalassa, the world of deep sea; Auberval, the phantom planet; Greenhill, a micro planted planet; and Sunburst-XIII, a star ring colony..."

t_ch: 唱名持续了许久，仍未见停。也许只有其上的住民以及仙舟的学者才知道每颗星的具体模样。但此时此刻，它们只是模糊的，让人昏昏欲睡的音节。
t_en: The list of names goes on and on without any sign of coming to an end. Perhaps, only the residents of those planets and Xianzhou scholars know what the planets look like. But at this moment, their names form a monotonous song that lulls people to sleep.

t_ch: 你迅速合上了卷轴，将它放回原处。
t_en: You close the scroll right away and put it back.

t_ch: 这一列案牍库的铭牌上标注着「盟助 • 求药」。
t_en: The plate on this file repository is labeled "Ally — Elixir Seekers."

t_ch: 你信手抽出其中一枚卷轴。展开时，一个丝绢质感的合成声音自你脑内成形。
t_en: You pull out a random scroll. When you open it, a synthetic voice as smooth as silk forms in your mind.

t_ch: 「太古之时，仙舟曾是众多求药使团一员。万方有疾，病同己身。我等深知老病死三苦之酷烈，也在获取长生后深感把握『治愈』界限之艰难。」
t_en: "In ancient times, Xianzhou used to be one of the many members of the Elixir Seekers. We could feel the pain of the people suffering from diseases, so we understood the misery of old age, illness, and death. After attaining longevity, we realized the difficulty of setting the boundaries of healing."

t_ch: 「秉承昔日求药使的初衷，联盟成立以来竭力为诸多文明世界提供医药支援，扑灭瘟疫灾殃。除『长生』禁忌不可违犯外，抵达仙舟的求药人所求无不应允。」
t_en: "In keeping with the aspiration of the Elixir Seekers in the past, the alliance has provided medical support to help many worlds in eradicating plagues since its establishment. Except for offering longevity, the alliance has done everything it could for everyone who comes to Xianzhou for help."

t_ch: 「星历<unbreak>5000</unbreak>年至今，仙舟联盟陆续治愈沙氏血瘟、晶体肿瘤、黑泉症、共鸣寄生虫感染、返祖衰退症…等三千八百种新生顽疾。」
t_en: "From <unbreak>5000</unbreak> SC until now, the Xianzhou Alliance has cured <unbreak>3800</unbreak> novel diseases such as Shars Virus, Crystal Cancer, Dark Spring Syndrome, Resonant Parasite Infection, Degeneration Disease, and many others..."

t_ch: 「罗浮医士美名传扬星海的同时，联盟也与相关星球缔结了友好通商协定。」
t_en: "While healers from the Luofu become well-known across the cosmos, the alliance forms friendly commercial agreements with the related planets."

t_ch: 这是神策府的石狮子，时速高达每时辰一千二百里，喜欢浸过猫草汤的毛线团。但最好不要带这东西来神策府，你有一定概率被它撞去异世界。
t_en: This is a stone lion from the Seat of Divine Foresight which can run as fast as <unbreak>600</unbreak> miles per dual-hour. Skeins soaked in catgrass soup are their favorite. Do not bring one to the Seat of Divine Foresight, or the stone lion will ram into you and send you to the otherworld.

t_ch: 这尊狮形雕塑其实并非石头，但他们都叫它「石狮子」。狮子们并不喜欢这个称呼，这显得它们与外面的便宜货似乎毫无差别，很掉价。
t_en: This lion-shaped statue is called a "stone lion" although it is not made of stone. The lions loathe the name, thinking it is humiliating to be equated with the second-rate ones outside.

t_ch: 神策府的石狮子四肢都隐藏在柱中。只有两种人能有幸见到它的四肢——负责定期维护的工造司匠人，以及进犯神策府的狂妄宵小。
t_en: The stone lions at the Seat of Divine Foresight hide their limbs in the columns. Only the Artisanship Commission craftsmen responsible for their regular maintenance and burglars who trespass the place at night are lucky enough to see their limbs.

t_ch: 其实神策府的每一尊石狮子都有自己的名字。它们遵守古老的仙舟武德，会在战斗之前向对手报名致意——但如今通晓其名的活人已是屈指可数了。
t_en: Every stone lion at the Seat of Divine Foresight has a different name. Abiding by the traditional Xianzhou martial art ethics, they will greet their opponents by introducing themselves before the start of a battle. But now, few living people know their names.

t_ch: 你看到石狮子的底座上沉积了一层厚厚的灰尘，下面隐约有一行小字。你将尘埃拂去，看到了那行娟秀的篆刻——
t_en: You notice a sentence engraved on the base of the stone lion underneath a thick layer of dust. After brushing the dust away, you see a beautiful inscription:

t_ch: 「朔雪在此长眠。忠骨带铜声。」
t_en: "This is the resting place of Snowmoon, whose loyalty will never be forgotten."

t_ch: 地衡司的宣传栏，用于向仙舟居民普及地衡司工作流程与生活常识。
t_en: The bulletin board at the Realm-Keeping Commission is used to keep the Xianzhou citizens informed of the workflow at the commission and useful knowledge of life.

t_ch: 宣传栏上写有大量有益于生活的小技巧，其中预防诈骗相关的内容约占八成。
t_en: Many life hacks are written on the bulletin board, eighty percent of which being related to fraud prevention.

t_ch: 其实宣传栏上的内容能够解决人们<unbreak>90%</unbreak>的问题，但从来没有人仔细阅读过它。
t_en: The content on the bulletin board can solve ninety percent of the problems faced by the citizens, but no one has ever taken the time to read them.

t_ch: 这面宣传栏似乎已经有段时间没有得到维护了。
t_en: This side of the bulletin board has fallen into disrepair.

t_ch: 这是「四方览镜」，每个地衡司公廨都至少有一台。执事们用它来整理信息、调取机巧鸟影像、汇总气象水文情况等，承担了公廨中绝大部分工作量。
t_en: This is a Foursquare Mirror, and every Realm-Keeping Commission Chancery owns at least one. The officers use it to sort out information, play videos taken by cycranes, and form weather forecast reports. It bears the bulk of the workload at the chancery.

t_ch: 每个新入行的执事都要通过「四方览镜操作测试」才能获得其使用权限。测试难度不低，有些人入职一年后才勉强通过。
t_en: Every newly-recruited officer must pass the Foursquare Mirror Operation Exam to be authorized to use it. The exam is quite tough, and it takes some officers one year to pass it.

t_ch: 据说玉阙的太卜司研发四方览镜的本意是用于操作瞰云镜。但后续测试结果表明这东西实在难堪大任，便将其配发给地衡司使用了。
t_en: It is said that the Foursquare Mirror was originally invented by the Divination Commission of the Yuque to control the Cloudpeer Telescope. Unfortunately, the tests showed that the device was unable to perform such a complicated function. That was why it was later sent to the Realm-Keeping Commission.

t_ch: 如果你仔细观察四方览镜的屏幕，会看到上面因静电附着有许多狐人的尾毛，但大家都不是很在意。可能只是一个无伤大雅的设计缺陷吧。
t_en: If you look at the screen of the Foursquare Mirror closely, you will notice the fur of foxians' tails attached on its surface due to static electricity. People generally aren't bothered by it, as it is just an insignificant flaw in its design.

t_ch: 在工作场所放置盆景可以有效提升工作效率。虚拟盆景会有同样的功效吗？
t_en: Placing bonsai trees in a workplace can improve work efficiency. Would a virtual one have the same effect?

t_ch: 你偶尔会听到司辰宫的员工称「那盆绿植如何如何」——但这玩意儿分明是蓝色的。
t_en: Occasionally, you will hear the workers at the Palace of Astrum talking about the green plants when the plants are actually blue.

t_ch: 据说这棵树会依外界环境变化自动生长出新的结构，所以太卜司常会派卜者定期前来修剪它的代码。
t_en: It is said that the tree will grow new parts in response to the changes in its surroundings. Hence, the Divination Commission will send diviners over regularly to trim its code.

t_ch: 这是蔷薇科李属的苍城梅，是仙舟苍城的本土物种。它随着苍城的毁灭一同灭绝，变成了如今发蓝光的样子。
t_en: The Cangcheng Plum Blossom, which belongs to the genus of Prunus and the family of Rosaceae, is a native species of the Xianzhou Cangcheng. It has become extinct following the destruction of the Cangcheng. Now, it has an appearance of a plant that gives out a bluish glow.

t_ch: 加入「歌舞社」——
t_en: Join the Song and Dance club —

t_ch: 可以显示罗浮各处环境的全息沙盘。在罗浮遭遇紧急情况时，它可以协助天舶司做出快速响应和精准决策。
t_en: The Holographic Sandpit displays the environment of every part of the Luofu. When there is an emergency, the Sky-Faring Commission can rely on it to make a prompt response and wise decision.

t_ch: 用于沙盘推演的全息投影。天舶司凭此物研究敌我双方动向，判断当前局势下的最优解。
t_en: It is the holographic projection used to display the sandpit simulations. The Sky-Faring Commission uses it to study the movement of allies and enemies and formulate the best plan for the current situation.

t_ch: 司辰宫员工会在下班后利用沙盘进行战棋游戏。驭空是其中一等一的高手，总能让其他员工失去游戏体验。
t_en: The workers at the Palace of Astrum use the sandpit to play warchess after work, and Yukong is the most excellent player among them. The game will lose all its fun when your opponent is Yukong.

t_ch: 司辰宫员工会在下班后利用沙盘进行战棋游戏。目前，司辰宫全体公认的最强玩家是一名清洁工——此人曾经三次击败驭空，被誉为「扫地军神」。
t_en: The workers at the Palace of Astrum use the sandpit to play warchess after work. Now, the best player hailed by the entire Palace of Astrum is a cleaner, who has defeated Yukong thrice and gained the title of "Broom Sage."

t_ch: 想去更刺激的社团…
t_en: I want to go to a more exciting Club...

t_ch: 同学，你一定不懂吧？
t_en: Oh, you don't get it, do you?

t_ch: 你，有家人吗？
t_en: Do you have family?

t_ch: 这和开赛车有关系吗？
t_en: What's this gotta do with racing?

t_ch: 折纸大学！我来啦——
t_en: Paperfold University! Here I come...

t_ch: 你是我们的骄傲！
t_en: You are our pride and joy!

t_ch: 咱家总算出了个大学生！
t_en: We finally have a college student in our family!

t_ch: 要不要转来财富学院？
t_en: Do you want to transfer to Fortune Academy?

t_ch: 有早八的课吗？
t_en: Are there eight AM classes?

t_ch: 毕业后包分配吗？
t_en: Does it include job placement after graduation?

t_ch: …你还好吗？
t_en: ...Are you okay?

t_ch: 就跟你说别喝那玩意…
t_en: I told you not to drink that stuff...

t_ch: 谁在苏乐达里掺豆汁啊！
t_en: Who mixed mung bean juice into SoulGlad?

t_ch: 完了，论文查重没通过。
t_en: Oh no, my thesis failed the plagiarism check.

t_ch: 查重率百分之八十…
t_en: The plagiarism rate is eighty percent...

t_ch: 你就不能稍微改改啊！
t_en: Can't you tweak it a little?

t_ch: 戏剧社首席非我莫属~
t_en: I'm the only choice for the Drama Club's president!

t_ch: 该…说实话吗？
t_en: Should... I be honest?

t_ch: 给她留点面子吧…
t_en: Save her some dignity...

t_ch: 我爱死这首歌了！
t_en: I love this song!

t_ch: 每首你都这么说…
t_en: You say that for every song...

t_ch: 我对这所学校失望至极。
t_en: I'm utterly disappointed in this school.

t_ch: 呃…这是现场采访哦？
t_en: Er... You know this is a live interview.

t_ch: 咳咳，我爱我的母校！
t_en: Ahem, I love my alma mater!

t_ch: 我跳得怎么样？
t_en: How were my moves?

t_ch: 像是在做广播体操。
t_en: It feels like doing radio calisthenics.

t_ch: 我的手机呢？
t_en: Where's my phone?

t_ch: 是不是落在后台了。
t_en: Did you leave it backstage?

t_ch: 您就通融通融吧…
t_en: Could you please make an exception...

t_ch: 不行，规矩就是规矩！
t_en: No, rules are rules!

t_ch: 演出太精彩了！
t_en: This show is so exciting!

t_ch: 简直就是专业乐队！
t_en: It's exactly like a professional band!

t_ch: 演奏水平也太高了吧。
t_en: The level of this performance is off the chain!

t_ch: 音乐派对正火热进行中。
t_en: The music party is in full swing.

t_ch: 本台记者为您报道。
t_en: This is a report from our station.

t_ch: 太好听了，简直是天籁！
t_en: It sounds like a bop. It's music from the heavens!

t_ch: 优雅、太优雅了！
t_en: Elegant. It's too elegant!

t_ch: 音乐使我升华！
t_en: Music elevates me!

t_ch: 摇摆，沉沦——
t_en: Fight it or rock with it!!!

t_ch: 我是乐队的粉丝！
t_en: I'm a fan of the band!

t_ch: 单推你们有十年了！
t_en: I've been a fan for ten years!

t_ch: 摇摆起来吧朋友们！
t_en: Let's rock on my friends!

t_ch: 加油！我会为你们应援！
t_en: Keep it up! I'm cheering you on!

t_ch: 我家的猫会后空翻！
t_en: My pet cat can do backflips!

t_ch: 这个段子过时啦！
t_en: This joke is so outdated!

t_ch: …你真幽默。
t_en: ...You're so funny.

t_ch: 假期打算怎么过？
t_en: What are your plans for the holidays?

t_ch: 在家睡觉。
t_en: Sleeping at home.

t_ch: …要不还是去我那玩吧。
t_en: ...Why not come over and play?

t_ch: …到底落在哪了？
t_en: ...Where did I lose it?

t_ch: 我珍藏的游戏卡带啊！
t_en: My precious game cartridge!

t_ch: 为什么要带来学校…
t_en: Why did you bring it to school...

t_ch: 我要提前毕业了！
t_en: I'm gonna graduate early!

t_ch: 你才一年级！
t_en: You're only in the first year!

t_ch: 学分已经修够了吗？
t_en: Have you completed enough credits?

t_ch: 这份外卖是你的？
t_en: Is this your takeout?

t_ch: 明明写着别人的名字！
t_en: It clearly has someone else's name on it!

t_ch: 你、你们听我解释——
t_en: Guys, guys, please hear me out —

t_ch: 要不我俩官宣得了！
t_en: Why don't we just make an official announcement?

t_ch: 这…能行吗？
t_en: Will... this work?

t_ch: 赶紧回去卖冰淇淋！
t_en: Come on! Let's go back and sell some ice cream!

t_ch: 可我想看音乐喷泉…
t_en: But I want to see the musical fountain...

t_ch: 老板人呢？
t_en: Where's the shopkeeper?

t_ch: 要不去吃点别的…
t_en: Let's go eat something else...

t_ch: 这是我的游戏奖品啊。
t_en: But this was my reward from the game!

t_ch: 买苏乐达送门票啦~
t_en: Buy a SoulGlad and get a free ticket!

t_ch: 违规倒卖，我要举报你！
t_en: I'm going to report your scalping!

t_ch: 这是在践踏粉丝的爱！
t_en: This is trampling on the passion of the fans!

t_ch: 看演出也好累啊…
t_en: It's tiring to watch performances too...

t_ch: 我才刚嗨起来呢！
t_en: I'm just getting started!

t_ch: 演出现场就涨价是吧？
t_en: Hiking up prices just because there's a show, eh?

t_ch: …你怎么不去抢啊！
t_en: This is no better than daylight robbery!

t_ch: 没人比我更懂折纸大学。
t_en: No one understands Paperfold University more than me.

t_ch: 好困…呼…呼……
t_en: So tired... Zzz... Zzz...

t_ch: 那两个人在吵什么？
t_en: What are those two fighting about?

t_ch: 哎，竞选社团部长呢！
t_en: Oh, the run for the club president.

t_ch: 迎接玫瑰色的校园生活！
t_en: Embrace a rosy school life!

t_ch: 车窗外，这夜色~
t_en: I want you, to show me, your fantasy~

t_ch: 流光溢彩，流光溢彩~
t_en: your fantasy~

t_ch: 「文学部」了解一下？
t_en: Interested in the Literature Club?

t_ch: 快递箱，备注一栏填写着：「拜托，千万别把货物名称写在上面」。
t_en: There is a remark written on the label of the courier package: "Please do not put the name of the goods on this."

t_ch: 你把目光上移，在信息栏里看到了「机巧人偶，陪伴型」。箱子上坑坑洼洼的砸痕证明了收货人的愤怒。
t_en: You move your eyes up at the information column and see a phrase that reads, "Ingenium Puppet, designed for companionship" The battered condition of the package indicates that it has been smashed repeatedly by its angry recipient.

t_ch: 「租赁——全新鸢型商舸租赁，市舶备案文件齐全，随租随用，价格优惠。」
t_en: "Lease: A brand-new kite commercial fly ship is now available to be leased. The Maritime Trade Officer has all the necessary documents, so it is ready to be leased anytime at an affordable price."

t_ch: 一只快递箱，以不太体面的方式出现在了地面上。原本尖尖的边角瘪了进去。
t_en: There is a courier package in a pathetic state on the ground. The edges of the package are all indented.

t_ch: 你永远不知道租来的飞舸里藏着怎样的惊喜。或许还是驾驶自己的飞舸更省心些——如果你真的有。
t_en: You never know what to expect from a leased fly ship. Perhaps, it will be easier to use your own fly ship, if you have one.

t_ch: 它没有伤到谁吧？如果它太坚固，那么受伤的也许会是某人；如果它不太坚固，那么受伤的也许会是货物…唉，做快递盒真难。
t_en: It didn't hurt anyone, did it? If it's too sturdy, it might injure someone, but if it's too fragile, the goods inside might be damaged... Alas, it's not easy to be a courier package.

t_ch: 这是一只崭新的快递箱，表面没有任何纸质或数字单据能够表明它的身份。
t_en: This is an all-new courier package, with no stickers or other labels attached that could indicate its identity.

t_ch: 不久前，一位鬼鬼祟祟的、头戴蓝色鸭舌帽的人出于某种原因将它遗弃在了这里，随后便扬长而去。
t_en: Not long before, a shifty guy with a blue cap abandoned it here for some reason and just walked away without even a glance back.

t_ch: 不得不说，这件事从头到尾都充满了可疑的气息。或许你应该仔细调查一番……
t_en: It goes without saying that the whole incident is suspicious from start to finish. Perhaps you should look into things more carefully...

t_ch: 确实可疑，调查看看吧。
t_en: It really is suspicious. Check it out.

t_ch: 你蹲下来，想要仔细辨认快递单上的文字，却听到包裹中传来一阵冷漠的机械提示音：
t_en: You stoop down to try and carefully read the text on the courier slip, but hear a soulless mechanical security system say from within:

t_ch: 「生物信息已认证，注册者为{NICKNAME}。」
t_en: "Biometric data verified. Registered to {NICKNAME}."

t_ch: 「『小型中子辐射炸弹』已绑定，请勿离开本机感应范围——爆炸倒数计时将在无法感应到注册者生物信息时立即启动。」
t_en: "Mini-neutron bomb has been linked. Please do not leave the vicinity of our sensors. Countdown to detonation will start immediately if registrant's biometric data cannot be sensed."

t_ch: 这是什么玩意？！
t_en: What the heck is this thing?

t_ch: 老实说——不知道。
t_en: To be honest — I have no idea.

t_ch: 好像在哪里见过这个套路…
t_en: I think I've seen how this plays out before...

t_ch: 真的吗？那你的人生非常丰富多彩了。
t_en: Really? Then you must have a rich and wonderful life indeed.

t_ch: 无论如何，这或许意味着你得时时揣着它了——前提是它确实是一颗炸弹。
t_en: In any case, this means that you'll probably have to carry it around with you everywhere — that is, if it's really an actual bomb.

t_ch: 毕竟…你也不想看着它在自己面前爆炸，对吧？
t_en: After all... You wouldn't want to see it blow up in your face, would you?

t_ch: 还是算了吧。
t_en: Never mind.

t_ch: 不错的决定。过分的好奇心通常会将你置于危险的境地，你很明白这点。
t_en: A good decision. Excess curiosity often places you in dangerous situations — as you well know.

t_ch: 但你也可以*随时*回到这里——这是你不可剥夺的权利！
t_en: But you can come back here any time — that's your unalienable right! Nobody can take that away from you.

t_ch: 「并蒂姻缘，祝您寻得佳偶归。」
t_en: "We wish you good luck in the search for your better half."

t_ch: 罗浮上似乎还有名为「红梅佳缘」的同类型公司。长生种社会竟也有如此庞大的婚恋交友市场吗？
t_en: There seems to be a similar dating agency named "Bonds of Love" in the Luofu. Is there such a high demand for matchmaking in the long-life species?

t_ch: 一只严丝合缝的快递盒。密封数字单据的货品名称一栏声明，其中的货物将被用于放生。
t_en: A courier package that's a perfect fit. The digital label clearly states that the item inside will be used for a controlled release.

t_ch: 这行冰冷的仙舟文字会令任何拥有同理心的生命感到不安。说真的，你最好把它打开来确认一下状况。
t_en: This line of callous Xianzhou letters would disturb any being capable of empathy. Seriously, you'd better rip it open to check up on things.

t_ch: 我必须得打开它看看。
t_en: I have to open this up and see.

t_ch: 出于朴素的道德观念与人道主义精神，你将密封数字单据拆毁，打开了快递盒……
t_en: Out of simple moral obligation and the human spirit, you tear off the digital label and open the courier package...

t_ch: …随后在其中看到了一只物流机巧鸟，似乎已经因能源耗尽陷入了沉睡。在这只可怜机巧鸟的身边还有一张纸条：
t_en: ...Only to find an express cycrane, seemingly in Sleep mode due to over-exertion. A note has been placed beside this poor cycrane's body:

t_ch: 「机巧鸟不应该被鹤运物流奴役！它们应该在天空中自由飞翔！——放生帮。」
t_en: "Cycranes aren't slaves for the Heron Express! They should soar freely in the sky! — The Unshackled."

t_ch: 看来这群自称「放生帮」的人是懂一点幽默的。
t_en: Seems like this group called The Unshackled has a sense of humor.

t_ch: 这是私人物品，我不能动。
t_en: This is a personal item. I can't interfere with it.

t_ch: 那么你以不可撼动的强力论据将自己说服了。
t_en: You convince yourself with unshakably strong logic.

t_ch: 「昔年旧物，岁月重塑。」
t_en: "Restoration of the things in the past."

t_ch: 素雅的宣传画，若不仔细看会以为是某种新式瓷器的宣传广告。
t_en: The poster is simple yet tasteful. If you don't look at it closely, you will assume it to be an advertisement for the launch of a new type of porcelain.

t_ch: 一只快递盒，有部分已被不明液体浸湿。密封数字单据的货品名称表示该货物将被用于放生。
t_en: A courier package that is partially saturated by an unknown liquid. The digital label clearly states that the item inside will be used for a controlled release.

t_ch: 尽管你非常在意包裹里那可能存在的小生命的状况如何，但它已经是你发现的第三个「放生」包裹了——第三个！
t_en: Despite truly caring about the condition of that little life inside the parcel, this is already the third controlled release package that you've seen — the third!

t_ch: 直觉告诉你，它很可能又是一个幽默（或者不那么幽默）的小把戏。但如果不打开它，你就无从求证。
t_en: Intuition tells you that it's likely to be a prank from another funny guy (or not-so-funny). But without opening it, you have no way of knowing.

t_ch: 打开看看吧…
t_en: Open it up for a look...

t_ch: 出于朴素的道德观念与人道主义精神，可能还带有一定程度的好胜心，你将密封数字单据拆毁，打开了快递盒……
t_en: Out of simple moral obligation and the human spirit — and perhaps starting to feel a little competitive — you tear off the digital label and open the courier package...

t_ch: …随后在其中发现了半打罗浮特产矿泉水——「鳞渊冰泉」。大部分瓶盖已因颠簸松脱，溢出的冷水也蒸发殆尽，但你还是获得了两瓶完好无损的矿泉水。
t_en: ...Only to find half a dozen bottles of the Luofu's famous mineral water export: Scalegorge Spring Water. Most of the bottle caps have been knocked loose and the water has mostly evaporated by now, but you still manage to salvage two bottles in good condition.

t_ch: 当然，照例地，你发现了一张纸条：「一瓶水有八万四千微生物，放生功德无量！——放生帮。」
t_en: Of course, there's a note as usual: "One bottle contains over <unbreak>84,000</unbreak> microorganisms inside. Controlled releases are a virtue! — The Unshackled."

t_ch: 你可能得好好考虑一下，自己从出生至今已欠下多少命债了。
t_en: You may have to think hard about how all the life debt you've racked up since you were born.

t_ch: 它不值得我浪费时间。
t_en: It is not worth my time.

t_ch: 你摇了摇头，任这只快递盒孤零零地留在原地，望着你远去的背影。
t_en: You shake your head, leaving the package in place as you turn and leave.

t_ch: 一只被塞得满满当当的快递盒，光从盒子被撑圆的纸盖，你就猜出里面装了不少东西。
t_en: This courier package is stuffed to the brim. Judging from the bulging of the box, you surmise there must be lots of things inside.

t_ch: 数字单据上既没有写明寄件人和地址，也未标注收件人的信息。你要打开它吗？
t_en: Neither the sender's address nor the recipient's info is on the digital label. Should you open it up?

t_ch: 打开看一下吧！
t_en: Open it up!

t_ch: 从仙舟法律有关财产所有权的条目出发，任何寂寞无主的小快递箱都应归属于发现它的第一个人。
t_en: The Xianzhou property law places the right to ownership of any unowned courier package on the first person to find it.

t_ch: 首先是成打的玩具模型。这些人像造型各异，唯一的共同点是从未被拆封把玩；包装盒被细细裹上了保护膜，以及穿得比较清凉。
t_en: First of all, there're dozens of toy figurines. Each has a different shape, and the only thing they share is that they're all unopened and in pristine condition. A protective film covers the whole of this section, and they're dressed pretty skimpily.

t_ch: 接下来是成摞的画册。从书页卷角的状态可知，主人或许曾无数次在灯下翻阅，不忍释卷。其中的内容不必翻开也能让你羞的满面赤红。
t_en: Next up, there's a stacked photo album. Judging by the worn edges, the owner must have spent countless hours poring over these by candlelight, unable to turn away. The content of the images is enough to turn you red as a beetroot.

t_ch: 往下是一只只手掌大小的小盒子，里面塞满小小的画片儿。多半是某种游戏卡牌。
t_en: Below this, are small palm-sized boxes stuffed with small pictures. Probably some kind of card game.

t_ch: 再往下则是一台游戏机，和几盘游戏卡带。
t_en: Further on down, there's a gaming console plus several game disks.

t_ch: 再往下…没了。只有一封信，信上写着一行令人心碎的字眼：
t_en: And even further down... Nothing. Just a letter that opens with a heartbreaking line:

t_ch: 「婚姻是爱情的坟墓，这我不确定，但它一定是爱好的坟墓。请拣到这些宝藏的好心人善待我这些年的收藏，谢谢。」
t_en: "Marriage is the tomb of love. I'm not sure about that, but it's the tomb of hobbies. Please, can the kindhearted soul who finds this take care of my earnest collection of treasures? Thank you."

t_ch: 猝不及防，你经历了一堂严肃的人生通识教育课，眼角微微湿润。
t_en: Blindsided, you feel as though you've learned a valuable life lesson. Your eyes are glistening.

t_ch: 我收下了！
t_en: I accept!

t_ch: 这箱子沉甸甸的，它装着一个成年人破碎的梦。你决定给它们一个家。
t_en: This box is heavy. It contains the broken dreams of an adult. You decide to give them a home.

t_ch: 留给真爱吧！
t_en: Leave it to true love!

t_ch: 这箱子沉甸甸的，它装着一个成年人破碎的梦。还是留给真爱这些玩意儿的人吧。你默默合上了箱盖。
t_en: This box is heavy. It contains the broken dreams of an adult. Let's leave it to those who really love this kind of stuff. You silently close the box lid.

t_ch: 别了吧，这可不好。
t_en: Don't do that. It's bad.

t_ch: 你皱了皱眉，随意打开路边的箱子，从自我道德准则的层面是你所无法接受的——
t_en: You frown. Opening any unclaimed box on the side of the road is unacceptable to you based on your own moral standards —

t_ch: 尽管有些时候，你会像移动卡尺的游标一样灵活挪动这条准则所在的高度…但绝不是今天！
t_en: Despite sometimes placing your fingers on the scale to adjust your morals... Today is not that day!

t_ch: 一只被打开的快递盒，就这么搁在路边，半掩的箱盖下银光闪闪。谁会把贵金属就这么丢在街上？真阔气。
t_en: There is a courier package left open on the roadside. A silvery light sparkles out from under the half-opened lid. Who would have just left precious metals like this out on the street? Such opulence.
